category_sources: Official GitLab README describes obfs4 and obfs4proxy usage with Tor client and bridge transport configuration.
source_facts.description says it is a pluggable transport proxy for Tor implementing obfs4.
display_name_sources: Official README uses obfs4proxy in build and Tor configuration examples.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README documents protocol purpose, dependencies, installation, and Tor configuration examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://gitlab.com/yawning/obfs4; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes obfs4 as an obfuscation protocol and shows ClientTransportPlugin and ServerTransportPlugin usage.
source_facts.description identifies Tor, pluggable transport, proxy, and obfs4.
